name: MeiGen AI Design
description: Image and video generation across 9 leading models: GPT Image 2, Nanobanana 2, Seedream 5.0, Midjourney V8.1, Flux 2 Klein, Seedance 2.0, Happyhorse 1.0, Veo 3.1, plus local ComfyUI. SSRF-hardened, R2 uploads auto-expire after 24h. 1k+ stars.

MEIGEN_API_KEY.description: MeiGen cloud API key for managed image/video generation. Not required when using BYOK or offline ComfyUI mode.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for BYOK mode (GPT Image 2). Optional — only needed for BYOK backend.
